title: Ina Rece
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}} {{Character |type=Rebel |image=[[File:InaRece-RAII.png]] |name=Ina Rece |homeworld= |birth= |death=[[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], [[Arah asteroid belt|Belt of Arah]]''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the events of ''[[Star Wars: Rebel Assault II: The Hidden Empire]]'', which include Ina Rece's [[Death/Legends|death]] in the [[Arah asteroid belt|Belt of Arah]], to [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]]. |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]]''[[Star Wars: Rebel Assault II: The Hidden Empire]]'' |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Female]]{{LucasArts|url=products/rebel2/reb_stry.htm|text=''Rebel Assault II'' - Original Story}} |pronouns=She/her |height= |mass= |hair=Dark |feathers= |eyes= |skin=Light |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Thanks Rece. You've saved me from becoming space debris.''"
"''Just doin' my job. Besides, I try not to litter.|Rookie One and Rece, after the latter saved the former from a TIE interceptor|audio=InaRece1-RAII.flac|}} '''Ina Rece''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. As part of [[Rascal Squadron]], Rece was sent to the [[Arah asteroid belt|Belt of Arah]] in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]] to locate and disable the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire's]] [[Arah mining facility|hidden mining facility]]. The Rebels successfully [[Battle of Arah|destroyed]] the [[Mining/Legends|mining]] facility, but Rece was [[Death/Legends|killed]] in a surprise attack by three [[TIE/ph "Phantom" Multi-Role Stealth Starfighter/Legends|TIE Phantoms]] moments later. ==Biography== {{Quote|Okay. We've broken through the outer perimeter, but the party's not over yet.''"
"''Well, don't look now, but here comes the entertainment.|Merrick and Rece, before a TIE interceptor attack|audio=InaRece2-RAII.flac|}} A [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|woman]] [[Reproduction/Legends|born]] during the final [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]],Rece was in her early thirties ({{LucasArts|url=products/rebel2/reb_stry.htm|text=''Rebel Assault II'' - Original Story}}) during the events of ''[[Star Wars: Rebel Assault II: The Hidden Empire]]'', which takes place in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]] (''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''). This places her date of birth approximately ten years before the end of the Galactic Republic in [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]] (''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''). Ina Rece joined the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], serving as a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] in [[Rascal Squadron]] alongside her cousin and friend [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Ace Merrick]]. [[File:ReceShootsTIE-RAII.png|thumb|left|250px|Rece's X-wing destroys a TIE interceptor.]] In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]]—by which [[Time/Legends|time]] Rece was in her early thirties—the Alliance learned that the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] was processing [[oridium]] [[Ore/Legends|ore]] at a [[Arah mining facility|hidden mining facility]] in the [[Arah asteroid belt|Belt of Arah]] to [[Fuel/Legends|fuel]] the [[TIE/ph "Phantom" Multi-Role Stealth Starfighter/Legends|TIE Phantom]], a new [[Cloaking device/Legends|cloaking device]]-equipped starfighter which the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] intended to use to eliminate the Rebellion. In order to learn more about the new threat, [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Gial Ackbar]] dispatched Rece, Merrick and [[Rookie One]] in [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65 X-wing starfighters]] to the [[Dreighton Nebula/Legends|Dreighton Nebula]] to [[Battle of Arah|investigate]] the Belt of Arah and disable the [[Mining/Legends|mining]] facility. Rascal Squadron arrived at the Belt of Arah to find [[derillium mine]]s scattered around the perimeter. Merrick led the Rebels through the [[Asteroid field/Legends|asteroid field]], destroying any mines they encountered along the way. The [[Flight group/Legends|group]] cleared the outer perimeter but soon came under attack from numerous [[TIE/IN interceptor/Legends|TIE interceptors]]. Rece scored multiple [[Death/Legends|kills]] as the Rebels fought their way through the Imperial starfighters, including destroying one [[Interceptor/Legends|interceptor]] that Rookie One was unable to shake from his tail. The Rebels eventually reached the mining facility, built into one of the larger [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroids]]. The group entered the facility through a transport corridor designed for [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttles]] and cargo [[Drone/Legends|drones]], in which Rookie One destroyed the [[Deflector shield generator/Legends|shield emitters]] at an exchange junction, providing access to the [[Reactor/Legends|reactor core]]. Evading fire from sentry guns—which mistook the X-wings for floating debris—the Rebels destroyed the reactor's cooling system and escaped through an [[Thermal exhaust port/Legends|exhaust vent]] moments before the reactor went critical, destroying the facility. Their mission complete, Rascal Squadron prepared to return to the [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Alliance Fleet]]. Moments before jumping to [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]], however, three TIE Phantoms decloaked behind them and opened fire, killing Merrick with their opening salvo. Taken by surprise, Rece was unable to evade and was killed when the TIE Phantoms destroyed her X-wing. Rookie One escaped and later proved instrumental in [[Mission to Imdaar|ending]] the threat of the TIE Phantoms. ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|Rookie One, Rece…good shooting. See, I told ya it'd be fun.''"
"''Yeah, thanks Merrick. I had a ball. Can we go again?|Merrick and Rece, after negotiating the Belt of Arah|audio=InaRece3-RAII.flac|}} Rece was an energetic young woman who was considered to be attractive. She had dark [[Hair/Legends|hair]], light skin, and a strong, playful, and often dry sense of humor which she continued to display during tense situations. Rece was a skilled pilot and a capable [[Wingmate/Legends|wingmate]] to Merrick. ==Behind the scenes== {{Quote|Rascal One, we lost the kid!''"
"''We can't bring him back. We have to go on.|Rece and Merrick, from a game over cutscene|audio=InaRece4-RAII.flac|}} Ina Rece was created for the [[1995]] [[LucasArts]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Rebel Assault II: The Hidden Empire]]'', in which she was portrayed by actress [[Nicole Galland]]. Rece appears in the levels "The Asteroid Field", "Interceptor Attack" and "The Mining Facility." If Rookie One is killed during any of these levels, a game over cutscene shows Rece and Merrick continuing the mission without him. [[File:Garven_Dreis_Helmet.jpg|thumb|right|200px|Red Leader's flight helmet from ''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']] ''Rebel Assault II'' designer [[Vincent Lee]]'s storyboards and scripts document, dated [[November 16]], [[1994]], included a brief description of Rece.''[[Rogue Leaders: The Story of LucasArts]]'' Though not included in the game or its manual, the biography was adapted for use on the LucasArts website and the document was later printed in [[Rob Smith]]'s ''[[Rogue Leaders: The Story of LucasArts]]''. The version that appeared online places Rece in her early thirties during the game whereas Lee's original version described her as early twenties. Lee also made notes on the actors he thought most resembled each character in the game, choosing [[Wikipedia:Janine Turner|Janine Turner]] to represent Rece. Props and costumes created for the [[original trilogy]] of ''[[Star Wars]]'' movies were used during the filming of ''Rebel Assault II''.{{LucasArts|url=products/rebel2/reb_vid.htm|text=''Rebel Assault II'' - Live Action Video}} The [[Flight helmet/Legends|flight helmet]] worn by Rece is the same design as that worn by [[Red Leader/Legends|Red Leader]]''[[Star Wars Costumes: The Original Trilogy]]'' [[Garven Dreis/Legends|Garven Dreis]]{{CSWECite|I|207|Dreis, Garven}} in [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']], [[Nichos Panib]] in [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''Star Wars'': Episode V ''The Empire Strikes Back'']],{{InsiderCite|146|Rogues Gallery|Rogues Gallery: Clearance for Immediate Launch}} and a background character in [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'']]. ==Appearances== *''[[Star Wars: Rebel Assault II: The Hidden Empire]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== {{Mediacat|soundcat=Audio files of Ina Rece}} *{{LucasArts|url=products/rebel2/reb_stry.htm|text=''Rebel Assault II'' - Original Story}} *''[[Rogue Leaders: The Story of LucasArts]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Rece, Ina}} [[Category:Alliance Starfighter Corps personnel]] [[Category:Females]] [[Category:Humans]]
